title: Removed deprecated v1 resource endpoints
description: All /api/v1 resource paths have been removed. Migrate to the /api/v2 equivalents, which return paginated list envelopes instead of bare arrays.

title: Added Pokémon encounter location areas
description: GET /pokemon/{id}/encounters now resolves version-grouped encounter details, including methods, chances, and condition values.

title: Corrected sprite URLs for newer generations
description: Official-artwork sprite links for Gen 8 and 9 species pointed at a stale CDN host and returned 404s. They now resolve against the current asset domain.

title: Introduced consistent list pagination
description: List endpoints now accept limit and offset query params and return count, next, and previous fields for stable cursor-style traversal.
